# sccfm_service_group (Resource)

Provides a Service Group resource. Use this resource to create, read, update, and delete service groups in the Security Cloud Control unified object store. A service group can contain inline service values and/or references to existing service objects.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the object.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the object.
- `overrides` (Attributes List) List of per-target overrides. Each override replaces the default content for its target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides))
- `referenced_object_uids` (Set of String) Set of UIDs of service objects referenced by this group.
- `values` (Attributes List) Inline service values included in the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the object. This is a UUID generated by the object service.

<a id="nestedatt--overrides"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides`

Required:

- `target_id` (String) The ID of the target (device, service, or shared policy).

Optional:

- `referenced_object_uids` (Set of String) Set of UIDs of service objects for this target override.
- `values` (Attributes List) Inline service values for this target override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides--values))

<a id="nestedatt--overrides--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides.values`

Required:

- `protocol` (String) The protocol (e.g., `TCP`, `UDP`, `ICMP`).

Optional:

- `value` (String) The port value (e.g., `80`, `8000-8080`). Required for TCP/UDP protocols.



<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Required:

- `protocol` (String) The protocol (e.g., `TCP`, `UDP`, `ICMP`).

Optional:

- `value` (String) The port value (e.g., `80`, `8000-8080`). Required for TCP/UDP protocols.
